data.speaker: Rootweaver
data.text: Hmm. You smell like fresh sap and ambition. Good combination.

data.speaker: Rootweaver
data.text: I've been brewing potions from the ingredients around here for longer than I care to remember.

data.speaker: Rootweaver
data.text: Find an Alchemy Table, gather your materials, and brew something useful. Start with Mana Draughts — every Keeper needs them.
